final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a dark gothic castle interior with soaring vaulted ceilings and blood-red stained glass light.

Style/medium: photorealistic dark gothic architectural interior, inspired by H.R. Giger's brooding aesthetic and classic European gothic cathedral photography
Composition: wide-angle shot from floor level looking upward toward the vaulted ceiling, emphasizing vertical grandeur and oppressive scale
Subject: towering gothic vaulted ceiling with ribbed stone arches, iron candelabras with dripping candles, heavy iron chains as decorative elements, aged stone walls
Scene/backdrop: castle interior deep within fortress walls, no natural daylight except blood-red light filtering through stained glass windows
Lighting/mood: blood-red colored light streaming through stained glass windows casting crimson pools on stone floors, deep impenetrable shadows dominating 70% of the frame, candlelight as secondary warm amber accent, oppressive and mysterious atmosphere
Color palette: deep charcoal and near-black stone as dominant base, blood red as the singular dramatic accent from window light, amber candlelight as a secondary warm note
Materials/textures: rough-hewn cold stone with visible mortar cracks, oxidized wrought iron with surface rust, tallow-dripped candle wax, heavy iron chain links
Avoid: bright or cheerful lighting, modern architectural elements, clean or polished surfaces, fantasy cartoon style, overexposed stained glass glow, flat shadows
